verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The seed you planted deep Has yet to grow You've wondered when you'll reap The things you sow And how long has it been Since rain last touched your ground You've searched the skies But the rain just can't be found

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But it will rain again The fruit will fill the vine The stalk will bend with wheat The grapes burst forth with wine So, go into your field Your work is not in vain God promised harvest And I know it will rain

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So, lift your head today And see the task This rain will come your way If you will ask Go build your barns, my friend Prepare to store the grain The clouds are coming in And I know it will rain

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God promised harvest And I know it will rain
